title: Emails & Activities Questions
excerpt: I connected my email with monday and in the emails & activities log I had some emails get pulled into a project and don’t want them. Is there a way I can delete them?

posts.author: drosen (David Rosenbrock)
posts.cookedHtml: I connected my email with monday and in the emails & activities log I had some emails get pulled into a project and don’t want them. Is there a way I can delete them?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @drosen,

I am afraid as of now, it isn’t currently possible to delete emails from the app. I can definitely understand the importance of such a feature, so will happily investigate this internally. I’d also recommend submitting this request here, Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum

posts.author: Mindflows_MK (MK Escabarte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi David, this is MK from Mindflows. I totally get where you’re coming from. While you can’t delete emails directly from the Emails & Activities log, you can archive or remove the email from the item. For future emails, you can adjust your email integration settings to make sure only the ones you want are pulled in.

Hope this helps
